sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (start_time TIMESTAMPTZ, end_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT age(end_time, start_time) AS duration FROM test_timestamps;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET end_time = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-08-20 12:00:00+00' WHERE start_time = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-08-01 12:00:00+00';
SELECT age(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-09-01 12:00:00+00', start_time) AS time_difference FROM test_timestamps;
